name: Armadimon

signature_move.name: Scratch Beat
signature_move.description: Strikes the opponent with the elongated claws on its forelegs.

description: A Mammal Digimon whose body is covered in a hard shell. It has a carefree, charming personality, but occasionally gets hurt if it gets carried away. Just like V-mon and the others, Armadimon is a descendant of an ancient species, so it is able to perform special Armor evolutions. Its Signature Move is striking the opponent with the elongated claws on its forelegs ( Scratch Beat ). Its Special Move is curling up its body and rushing the opponent ( Rolling Stone ).
